title.description: Create, edit, delete, and configure automatic achievement badges for users on the platform.

fields.imageHint: JPEG or PNG formats are supported, maximum size is 5MB.
fields.name: Badge Name
fields.downloadsHint: The minimum number of resource downloads users must achieve to earn this badge automatically.
fields.downloadsSystemFixed: This system badge has a fixed logic condition and cannot be customized.

validation.imageType: Please upload a valid image file only
validation.downloadsPositive: Required downloads must be a non-negative number

messages.emptyDesc: Get started by creating the first achievement badge for the system.

badges.title: Earned Badges
badges.subtitle: Badges you have unlocked through learning activities.

profile.privilegesFooterHint: This rank status is calculated automatically based on your total XP points. Reaching higher XP brackets unlocks superior storage and approval privileges.

dashboard.subtitle: Ready to discover and share knowledge today?

admin.appealMessage: Your account has been locked due to a violation of community guidelines. If you believe this is a mistake or wish to appeal this decision, you can submit an appeal directly to the Support Team.
admin.appealReasonPlaceholder: Enter detailed reason or evidence here...
admin.copiedAppeal: Appeal details copied to clipboard! You can paste directly into your email client (Gmail, Yahoo...).
admin.redirectingToGmail: Opening Gmail... Please review and send your appeal in the new tab.
admin.documentBannedMessage: This document has been temporarily hidden or locked due to a violation of our community guidelines. You can enter your appeal below to submit it to the administration team.
admin.refundSuccess: Appeal approved! Document restored and penalty points refunded.
admin.noPendingReports: Clean Inbox! No pending reports to review.
admin.subTitle: Monitor system health, check usage metrics, and resolve reports.
admin.personalModeActive: You are viewing your Personal Space (XP progress, storage limits).
admin.decisionReject: Bác bỏ báo cáo (Giữ lại tài liệu)
admin.decisionRemove: Đồng ý báo cáo (Gỡ bỏ tài liệu)
admin.notePlaceholder: Enter reason, context, or feedback for this decision...
admin.banConfirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to suspend this user? They will not be able to log in, upload documents, or chat with AI.
admin.unbanConfirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to reactivate this student's account? They will regain full access to all features.
admin.banReasonPlaceholder: Enter explicit reason (e.g. uploaded malicious files, spamming RAG chat...)
admin.pleaseProvideReason: Please provide a reason for banning.
